key_findings: Task completion rate: 40% for recurring tasks, 60% for project creation, 80% for task assignment
Systemic issue: feature discoverability — users look in wrong places for key actions
Recurring task option is critically hard to find — 3/5 participants failed
Inline editing model is unexpected — users anticipate modal dialogs
NPS: 40. Promoters driven primarily by recurring tasks value
Top detractor drivers: onboarding confusion, team adoption friction, search failure
Feature requests by frequency: Teams integration (12%), Gantt view (9%), bulk edit (7%), notification controls (6%)
Primary switching trigger: recurring tasks accessibility vs Asana
Retention risk: team adoption stalls when non-PM teammates do not see value in week 1
Enterprise PMs blocked by missing RBAC and Teams integration at renewal
Recurring tasks used by 28% of accounts — 2x NPS, 3x retention for those accounts
Task dependencies used by 12% — exclusively Segment C (enterprise)
Segment A (1-5 users) median LTV: 4 months. Key churn window: months 2-4
